messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.

**George Hotz**, also known as "geohot", is an American hacker and software developer known for his work in the field of technology security research. He gained fame for being the first person to carrier-unlock an iPhone and for developing various jailbreaking tools for iOS devices. Additionally, he has worked on self-driving car technology and artificial intelligence projects.
